Munich · Italian Summer '26

ANTONIO turns 30

A White Party
2 July · 16:00 sharp · 'til last light

Pizza fresh from the oven, BBQ on the side, Aperol Spritz on rotation, and a full DJ set under the trees — from afternoon to the last light.
You bring the white shirt and something for the grill. We handle the rest.

Until we toast

Counting down

Decreto N° 24 2026
— by authority of the birthday boy —

Decreto

Special order · Thursday, 2 July · 16:00 sharp
  1. I. All meetings, lectures, deadlines, and dentist appointments scheduled for Thursday 2 July are hereby suspended. The day is taken.
  2. II. No working. No studying. No "just one quick email". Niente di niente. The park is the office.
  3. III. Required attire: white. Required mood: italodisco-adjacent. Required posture: spritz in hand, grass under feet, no plans after.

Francesco · padrone della festa

The plan

What's happening

Pizza Oven

Real oven, real heat, real pizza. Come with an empty stomach.

Decks Till Sundown

Generator, decks, speakers — a full DJ set rolling from afternoon to the last sunbeam.

Aperol & BBQ

Spritz on rotation, BBQ ready — bring something to throw on it.

Dress code
WHITE
Linen, lace, cotton, t-shirt — anything, as long as it's white.
Bonus points for vintage.

Where

Somewhere under the trees

Pin sent on RSVP
our side ←

Under the trees,
near the river.

Englischer Garten Nord · Grillzone Isar

The official grill zone sits on one bank of the Isar. We're setting up across the water — under the shade of the trees, right by the river, far enough from any houses to actually breathe.

The exact spot lands in your WhatsApp the morning of — that way we can shift if the meadow's busy, and you won't be wandering lost along the river.

Open in Google Maps →

If you can

Chip in

Cover the Aperol fund or bring your own — either is welcome. No fixed amount, no pressure. Just so we know how much to buy.
